title: Google Gemini Chat Model stream parsing error
symptom: When sending a query through the Google Gemini Chat Model, an error 'Failed to parse stream' appears.
not_this_if: Error does not occur with correct host
root_cause: The error occurs due to an incorrect host URL being used for the Google Gemini API. The API requires a specific endpoint to function correctly, and using a different host can lead to parsing errors.
fix_steps: Check the host URL for the Google Gemini Chat Model node.
Save the changes and try sending the query again.
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the host URL for the Google Gemini Chat Model node.
